title: Crude Oil Surges 50% as Strait of Hormuz Tensions Rewrite Risk Premium
author: Sahana Lydia
excerpt: Oil markets have surged over the past month, driven by geopolitical risk centered on the Strait of Hormuz. WTI near $95, Brent above $102.

title: Trump Pushes for Fed Rate Cuts. Markets Bet It Won't.
author: Sahana Lydia
excerpt: President Trump called for a special Fed meeting to cut rates. Prediction markets assign near certainty the Fed will hold steady.

title: Recession Fears Recede as Yield Curve Normalizes
author: Sahana Lydia
excerpt: Recession risks have subsided in recent months, as key economic indicators point to a slowdown rather than an immediate downturn.

title: AI Driven Equities Significantly Outperformed Broad Markets Over the Past 12 Months
author: Sahana Lydia
excerpt: AMD, Google, Palantir, and Nvidia led gains while broad indices and sectors lagged.
